return(function(A,H,D,Y,T,e,B,W,f,E,b,p,J,t,v,j,R,N,d,G,y,M,i,g)p,M,d,J,f,t,y,j,N,G,R,i,E,g,b,W,v=function(A,X)local H=f(X)local D=function(...)return G(A,{...},X,H)end return D end,function(A)local
